mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id, menu_name, menu_type, route_path, component_path, permission_code, icon, sort_no, visible, status, remark, created_by, updated_by FROM sys_menu WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id ASC

SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.menu_type, m.route_path, m.component_path, m.permission_code, m.icon, m.sort_no, m.visible, m.status, m.remark, m.created_by, m.updated_by FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON rm.menu_id = m.id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1 AND m.menu_type IN ('M', 'C') AND m.visible = 1 ORDER BY m.sort_no ASC, m.id ASC

SELECT DISTINCT m.permission_code FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON rm.menu_id = m.id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1 AND m.permission_code IS NOT NULL AND m.permission_code != '' ORDER BY m.permission_code ASC
SELECT id, parent_id, menu_name, menu_type, route_path, component_path, permission_code, icon, sort_no, visible, status, remark, created_by, updated_by FROM sys_menu WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_menu ( parent_id, menu_name, menu_type, route_path, component_path, permission_code, icon, sort_no, visible, status, remark, created_by, updated_by, deleted, version ) VALUES ( #{parentId}, #{menuName}, #{menuType}, #{routePath}, #{componentPath}, #{permissionCode}, #{icon}, #{sortNo}, #{visible}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_menu SET parent_id = #{parentId}, menu_name = #{menuName}, menu_type = #{menuType}, route_path = #{routePath}, component_path = #{componentPath}, permission_code = #{permissionCode}, icon = #{icon}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, visible = #{visible}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_menu SET deleted = 1, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_menu WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0
